programs.title: Above and Beyond: NASA's Journey to Tomorrow
programs.desc: A story about NASA's achievements and implemented development plans.Viewers will learn the behind-the-scenes of the expedition to the Moon and other past endeavors.They will learn about the challenges facing the agency.

programs.title: How the Universe Works 5
programs.sub_title: The most dangerous corners of space
programs.desc: A series presenting the elements that make up the Universe.Thanks to computer graphics, viewers will be able to see unusual astronomical objects found in space.

programs.title: The Dino Hunters
programs.desc: For years, American cowboys lived only by raising cattle.For some time now, many of them have been choosing a different business path - searching for dinosaur bones.They charge handsomely for their finds.

programs.title: Blowing Up History 4
programs.desc: The secrets of building mythical and legendary buildings of antiquity.The program presents presentations using computer animations and the latest results of archaeological research.

programs.title: Blowing Up History 4
programs.sub_title: Leaning Tower of Pisa: a new puzzle
programs.desc: The secrets of building mythical and legendary buildings of antiquity.The program presents presentations using computer animations and the latest results of archaeological research.
